introSection: Jet Coaster (Japanese: ジェットコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Biwako Tower in Otsu, Shiga, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is listed as being manufactured by Meisho Amusement Machines on most sources. Inspecting a picture however, reveals that the coaster train and track are identical to TOGOs SL Coaster. While Meisho does feature a coaster model named SL Coaster which also includes an steam engine themed front car. The track and train design is noticeably different, prompting Coasterpedia to list this coaster as build by Togo instead.

fullText:
Jet Coaster (Japanese: ジェットコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Biwako Tower in Otsu, Shiga, Japan.

The ride is listed as being manufactured by Meisho Amusement Machines on most sources. Inspecting a picture however, reveals that the coaster train and track are identical to TOGOs SL Coaster. While Meisho does feature a coaster model named SL Coaster which also includes an steam engine themed front car. The track and train design is noticeably different, prompting Coasterpedia to list this coaster as build by Togo instead.

Baby blue track and supports.
